title: Red's Mutants
description: Adds 4 Mutants to the Game, the Headcrab, Mutant, Spitter Mutant and Tall Mutant, we could say it is horror. -Red
body:
**Red's Mutants** introduces three new mutant creatures to your Minecraft world!
- 
- **Headcrab** – A creepy, skittering menace (inspired by HL) that lurks in the shadows.
- **Mutant** – A hulking, relentless beast that won’t go down without a fight.
- **Tall Mutant** – The rarest and most fearsome of them all, towering over its prey.
- **Spitter Mutant** - Just spits acid bruh.
These mutants spawn naturally, adding a new layer of challenge and danger to your survival experience. Are you ready to face them?

 

Please Leave feedbacks for this beta test release. I would Love it!
